name: Drift-Aware RL-based Wavelet Denoising for Network-Traffic Anomaly Detection

description: arXiv:2607.20011v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Traffic-utilisation measurements for network monitoring are corrupted by additive noise and statistical drift: time-dependent change in the signal's mean, variance, distributional shape, or tail behaviour. Static wavelet denoising, calibrated under stationary independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) Gaussian assumptions, becomes mismatch...
author: Priyalakshmi Sheela, Indrakshi Dey
